questionText: Provide details of your organization's investments in low-carbon R&D for real estate and construction activities over the last three years.
questionKo: 귀사의 investments in 저탄소 R&D for 부동산 및 건설 활동 over the last three years.에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: Actions being taken by high intensity sectors are key in the transition to a low-carbon economy. Specifically, the level of investments in low-carbon R&D provides an indication of the level to which future earning capacity of core business might be affected, and the extent to which future resilience to climate-related issues can be incorporated in businesses.

options: Combined solar PV and heat pump
Unable to disaggregate by technology area
optionsKo: Combined solar PV 및 heat pump
Unable to disaggregate by 기술 area

columns.text: Stage of development in the reporting year
columns.textKo: Stage of development in the 보고연도

columns.text: Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years
columns.textKo: Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years

columns.text: R&D investment figure in the reporting year (unit currency as selected in 1.2) (optional)
columns.textKo: R&D investment figure in the 보고연도 (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2) (optional)

columns.text: Average % of total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years
columns.textKo: Average % of total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years

columns.text: Explain how your R&D investment in this technology area is aligned with your climate commitments and/or climate transition plan
columns.textKo: Explain how your R&D investment in this 기술 area is aligned with your climate commitments 및/또는 기후 전환계획

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 5.5.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Yes" in response to 5.5.

guidance.text:
General 
Depending on the financial accounting standard your organization adheres to, R&D investment may be calculated from your organization's CAPEX or OPEX. Organizations may also invest in R&D via acquisitions.
Technology area (column 1) 
Select the option that best describes the technology area that the investment relates to from the list of options provided, which have been developed using the IEA Energy Perspectives (ETP) Clean Energy Technology Guide . Refer to the guide for examples of technologies which can be categorized under each technology area.
If the investment you are disclosing does not fall into any of the technology areas provided, select "Other, please specify".
If you invest in low-carbon R&D relating to multiple technologies, please provide data for each investment separately by adding one row per technology area.
If you invest in low-carbon R&D but are unable to provide details relating to a specific technology area, select "Unable to disaggregate by technology area" and provide further details in column "Explain how…".
Stage of development in the reporting year (column 2) 
Select the option that best describes the stage of development of the low-carbon technology the investment relates to in the reporting year.
This column will not appear if "Unable to disaggregate by technology area" is selected in the previous column.
Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years (column 3) 
Enter the percentage of investment in low-carbon R&D relating to the selected technology area as an average proportion of your total R&D spend over the last 3 years.
If you are unable to disaggregate your investments by technology area, you should enter the percentage of your total investment in low-carbon R&D as an average proportion of your total R&D spend over the last 3 years.
This figure can be calculated with the following formula, where X is your reporting year:
(( investment in year X + investment in year X-1 + investment in year X-2 ) / (total R&D in year X + total R&D in year X-1 + total R&D in year X-2 )) x 100
The sum of figures entered in this column for all rows should not exceed 100%.
R&D investment figure in the reporting year (optional) (column 4) 
If you wish to provide the low-carbon R&D investment figure in the reporting year relating to the technology area (or overall if unable to disaggregate), you can do so in this column. This is optional.
Average % of total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years (column 5) 
Enter the low-carbon R&D investment figure planned for the selected technology area as a percentage of your organization's total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years.
This figure can be calculated with the following formula, where X is your reporting year:
((((planned investment in year X + 1) + (planned investment in year X + 2) + (planned investment in year X + 3) + (planned investment in year X + 4) + (planned investment in year X + 5)) / ((total planned R&D in year X + 1) + (total planned R&D in year X + 2) + (total planned R&D in year X + 3) + (total planned R&D in year X + 4) + (total planned R&D in year X+5)))) x 100
The sum of figures entered in this column for all rows should not exceed 100%.
If you do not have any low-carbon R&D investment planned over the next 5 years for the selected technology area, enter "0" in this column.
It is acknowledged that the figure entered for this column will be estimates. You may, for example, estimate planned low-carbon R&D investment for a technology area based on your organization's strategy, financial planning, and/or climate transition plan. Assumptions underlying these estimates should be disclosed in the final column "Explain how…". 
If you are unable to disaggregate your investments by technology area, enter the percentage that best represents your total planned investment in low-carbon R&D as a percentage of your organization's total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years.
Note that "the next 5 years" start from the end of the reporting year as reported in 1.4 e.g. if your reporting year in1.4 is from 01/01/2022 to 31/12/2022, then the next 5 years will be from 01/01/2023 to 31/12/2027.
Explain how your R&D investment in this technology area is aligned with your climate commitments and/or climate transition plan (column 6) 
For example, if relevant, explain how the technology area your organization has invested in is key to your sector's transition to net-zero emissions by 2050 or earlier, and/or how it relates to key performance indicators within your climate transition plan. Explain why your organization has chosen to invest in this low-carbon technology area over other technologies relevant to your sector.
You may also wish to provide further details of your investments in low-carbon R&D, their trend, and any other pertinent information relating to the technology.
If you are unable to disclose investments relating to specific low-carbon technologies, you may wish to explain your organization's general approach to low-carbon R&D and how it relates to your climate commitments and/or, if relevant, your organization's climate transition plan in this column.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Depending on the financial accounting standard 귀사 adheres to, R&D investment may be calculated from 귀사의 자본지출(CAPEX) 또는 운영비용(OPEX). Organizations may also invest in R&D via acquisitions. 기술 area (열 1) Select the option that best 설명s the 기술 area that the investment relates to from the list of options 입력, which have been developed using the IEA Energy Perspectives (ETP) Clean Energy 기술 Guide. Refer to the guide for examples of technologies which can be categorized under each 기술 area. 만약 the investment you are disclosing does not fall into 하나 이상 의 기술 areas 입력, select "Other, 직접 입력". 만약 you invest in 저탄소 R&D relating to multiple technologies, please provide data for each investment separately by adding one 행 per 기술 area. 만약 you invest in 저탄소 R&D but are unable to 세부 정보를 입력 relating to a specific 기술 area, select "Unable to disaggregate by 기술 area" 및 provide further details in 열 "Explain how…". Stage of development in the 보고연도 (열 2) Select the option that best 설명s the stage of development 의 low-carbon 기술 the investment relates to in the 보고연도. This 열 will not appear 만약 "Unable to disaggregate by 기술 area" is 선택 in the previous 열. Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years (열 3) Enter the percentage of investment in 저탄소 R&D relating to the 선택 기술 area as an average proportion of your total R&D spend over the last 3 years. 만약 you are unable to disaggregate your investments by 기술 area, you 해야 합니다 enter the percentage of your total investment in 저탄소 R&D as an average proportion of your total R&D spend over the last 3 years. This figure can be calculated with the following formula, 여기서 X is your 보고연도: ((investment in year X + investment in year X-1 + investment in year X-2) / (total R&D in year X + total R&D in year X-1 + total R&D in year X-2)) x 100 The sum of figures entered in this 열 for all 행 해야 합니다 not exceed 100%. R&D investment figure in the 보고연도 (optional) (열 4) 만약 you wish to provide the 저탄소 R&D investment figure in the 보고연도 relating to the 기술 area (or overall 만약 unable to disaggregate), you can do so in this 열. This is optional. Average % of total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years (열 5) Enter the 저탄소 R&D investment figure planned 에 대한 선택 기술 area as a percentage of 귀사의 total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years. This figure can be calculated with the following formula, 여기서 X is your 보고연도: ((((planned investment in year X + 1) + (planned investment in year X + 2) + (planned investment in year X + 3) + (planned investment in year X + 4) + (planned investment in year X + 5)) / ((total planned R&D in year X + 1) + (total planned R&D in year X + 2) + (total planned R&D in year X + 3) + (total planned R&D in year X + 4) + (total planned R&D in year X+5)))) x 100 The sum of figures entered in this 열 for all 행 해야 합니다 not exceed 100%. 만약 you do not have 하나 이상 저탄소 R&D investment planned over the next 5 years 에 대한 선택 기술 area, enter "0" in this 열. It is acknowledged that the figure entered for this 열 will be estimates. You may, for example, estimate planned 저탄소 R&D investment for a 기술 area based on 귀사의 전략, 재무계획, 및/또는 기후 전환계획. Assumptions underlying these estimates 해야 합니다 be 공개 in the final 열 "Explain how…". 만약 you are unable to disaggregate your investments by 기술 area, enter the percentage that best represents your total planned investment in 저탄소 R&D as a percentage of 귀사의 total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years. Note that "the next 5 years" start from the end 의 보고연도 as 보고 in 1.4 e.g. 만약 your 보고연도 in1.4 is from 01/01/2022 to 31/12/2022, then the next 5 years will be from 01/01/2023 to 31/12/2027. Explain how your R&D investment in this 기술 area is aligned with your climate commitments 및/또는 기후 전환계획 (열 6) For example, 만약 관련, explain how the 기술 area 귀사 has invested in is key to your sector's transition to net-zero emissions by 2050 또는 earlier, 및/또는 how it relates to key performance indicators within your 기후 전환계획. 그 이유를 설명 귀사 has chosen to invest in this low-carbon 기술 area over other technologies 관련 to your sector. You may also wish to provide further details of your investments in 저탄소 R&D, their trend, 및 하나 이상 other pertinent information relating to the 기술. 만약 you are unable to disclose investments relating to specific low-carbon technologies, you may wish to explain 귀사의 general approach to 저탄소 R&D 및 how it relates to your climate commitments and/or, 만약 관련, 귀사의 기후 전환계획 in this 열.

guidance.text:
Low-carbon product or service : CDP broadly defines a low-carbon product/service as a product or service which has comparatively lower emissions across its entire life cycle (i.e. from material acquisition through to product end-of-life) when compared to a baseline (business-as-usual) scenario or reference product of a similar function. Note that a product can only be considered low-carbon if its production and use does not prevent and/or contributes to reaching net-zero by 2050 or sooner. To define whether the product or service is low-carbon, CDP encourages the use of existing industry taxonomies and frameworks such as Climate Bonds Taxonomy , the IEA Energy Technology Perspectives (ETP) Clean Energy Technology Guide , and the EU Taxonomy for Environmentally Sustainable Economic Activities .
Research and development (R&D) : refers to activities companies undertake to innovate and introduce new products and services. It is often the first stage in the development process. Investment in R&D is a type of operating expense associated with the research and development of a company's goods or services.
Building energy management system (BEMS) : An integrated system comprising hardware, software, and services that leverage information and communication technology for monitoring, automating, and controlling energy consumption. Examples include smart meters and smart billing, data analytics and performance.
guidance.textKo: Low-carbon product 또는 service: CDP broadly defines a low-carbon product/service as a product 또는 service which has comparatively lower emissions across its entire life cycle (i.e. from material acquisition through to product end-of-life) 경우 compared to a baseline (business-as-usual) scenario 또는 reference product of a similar function. Note that a product can only be considered low-carbon 만약 its production 및 use does not prevent 및/또는 contributes to reaching net-zero by 2050 또는 sooner. To define whether the product 또는 service is low-carbon, CDP encourages the use of existing industry taxonomies 및 frameworks such as Climate Bonds Taxonomy, the IEA Energy 기술 Perspectives (ETP) Clean Energy 기술 Guide, 및 the EU Taxonomy for Environmentally Sustainable Economic Activities. Research 및 development (R&D): refers to activities companies undertake to innovate 및 introduce 신규 제품 및 서비스. It is often the first stage in the development 프로세스. Investment in R&D is a type of operating expense associated with the research 및 development of a company's goods 또는 services. Building energy 관리 system (BEMS): An integrated system comprising hardware, software, 및 services that leverage information 및 communication 기술 for 모니터링, automating, 및 controlling 에너지 소비량. Examples include smart meters 및 smart billing, data analytics 및 performance.

criteria.criteria:
Any option excluding 'Unable to disaggregate by technology area' must be selected in column 'Technology area' to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding column 'R&D investment figure in the reporting year (unit currency as selected in 1.2) (optional)'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 하나 이상 option 제외 'Unable to disaggregate by 기술 area' 해야 합니다 be 선택 in 열 '기술 area' to be 획득 가능 for 공시 점. 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개 (제외 열 'R&D investment figure in the 보고연도 (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2) (optional)'). 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 5/5점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed excluding column 'R&D investment figure in the reporting year (unit currency as selected in 1.2) (optional)' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Table 완성 제외 열 'R&D investment figure in the 보고연도 (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2) (optional)' - 2 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Either of the following are met - 1 point
Sum of figures provided in column 'Average % of total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years' in all rows is greater than sum of figures provided in column 'Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years' in all rows.
OR
Sum of figures provided in column 'Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years' is 100%.
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 관리 점수를 획득하려면 인지에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. Either 의 following are met - 1 점 Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Average % of total R&D investment planned over the next 5 years' in all 행 is 초과 sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years' in all 행. 또는 Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Average % of total R&D investment over the last 3 years' is 100%. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
All of the following selected in column 'Stage of development in the reporting year' in any row - 1 point
'Basic academic/theoretical research' OR 'Applied research and development' AND
'Pilot demonstration' OR 'Full/commercial-scale demonstration' AND
'Small scale commercial deployment' OR 'Large scale commercial deployment'
(Please note: At least 3 rows must be reported to achieve 1 point)
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 리더십 점수를 획득하려면 관리에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. All 의 following 선택 in 열 'Stage of development in the 보고연도' in 하나 이상 행 - 1 점 'Basic academic/theoretical research' 또는 'Applied research 및 development' 그리고 'Pilot demonstration' 또는 'Full/commercial-scale demonstration' 그리고 'Small scale commercial deployment' 또는 'Large scale commercial deployment' (Please note: 최소 3 행 해야 합니다 be 보고 to achieve 1 점) 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding column 'R&D investment figure in the reporting year (unit currency as selected in 1.2) (optional)'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this question.

simpleHelpKo: Actions being taken by high intensity sectors are key in the transition to a low-carbon economy. Specifically, the level of investments in 저탄소 R&D provides an indication 의 level to which future earning capacity of core business might be affected, 및 the extent to which future resilience to 기후 관련 이슈 can be incorporated in businesses.
